VRSN_CD1 VRSN_CD1 Version Code 1 CHAR 5 This code represents the version of the form actually complted in the hospital.
29 VRSN_CD2 VRSN_CD2 Version Code 2 CHAR 5 This code represents the verion of the data specification sused to create the data record for submssion to the National System.
